memberdef.name: F32ToUQ15Obj_getset
F32ToUQ15ObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "cvt.F32ToUQ15", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(F32ToUQ15Object), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)F32ToUQ15Obj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "F32ToUQ15 type.", .tp_methods = F32ToUQ15Obj_methods, .tp_getset = F32ToUQ15Obj_getset, .tp_new = F32ToUQ15Obj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)F32ToUQ15Obj_init, }
